questions: Does the TicketDetail type accurately reflect the server API response for all run states?
Does the PowerShell 5.1 help example use correct quoting for backtick escape sequences?
Do all four features (search, run display, dry-run, query-file) meet ticket requirements?

answers.answer: No. The TicketDetail type declared startedAt as string, but the server returns null for QUEUED runs. Fixed to string | null.
evidence: src/tickets/get.ts:17 — startedAt typed as string; server's mapRunHistoryItem (ticket-service.ts:462) passes nullable startedAt
Implementation report: 'tickets get HLX-65 (QUEUED run) Shows QUEUED in progress in progress' confirms null startedAt at runtime

answers.answer: No. The PS 5.1 example used single quotes with backtick escaping, but backtick is only an escape character inside double-quoted strings in PowerShell. Fixed outer quotes from single to double.
evidence: src/inspect/index.ts:26,63 — PS 5.1 examples used single quotes wrapping backtick-escaped content
PowerShell language spec: single-quoted strings have no escape processing; backtick escaping requires double-quoted strings

answers.answer: Yes. All four features are correctly implemented: (1) run display uses correct field names startedAt/finishedAt, (2) --dry-run prints payload and exits without API call, (3) --search passes server-side query param, (4) --query-file reads SQL from file with proper error handling and PS examples in help.
evidence: src/tickets/get.ts:17-18,71-72 — field names match server API
src/tickets/continue.ts:30-36 — dry-run gate before POST call
src/tickets/list.ts:66-70 — search query param passed to server
src/inspect/index.ts:70-88 — query-file with readFileSync and error handling

statement: Code review found and fixed two issues in helix-cli: (1) TicketDetail.startedAt type corrected to string | null to match server nullable field for QUEUED runs, (2) PS 5.1 help examples corrected from single-quoted to double-quoted strings so backtick escaping works correctly. All quality gates pass after fixes (typecheck, build, 30/30 tests). No issues found in helix-global-server server-side search implementation.
